title: 100 Card Sleeves Hard Sleeves for Cards, 3"x4" Baseball Card Protectors Hard Plastic, 35pt Card Holders for Baseball Cards, Football Cards (100 Hard Sleeves + 100 Clear Sleeves)
features: 【BONUS PACKS】- You will get 100 transparent hard sleeves for cards and 100 soft card sleeves, giving your trading cards or baseball cards double protection.

【SUPER CLEAR】- Our hard sleeves for cards is highly transparent, different from most blue tint baseball card holders. Theses card sleeves hard plastic not only fit for mtg yugioh and other playing cards board game, but also suit for sports cards baseball cards football card kpop photocard.
【STANDARD SIZE】- External size 3*4 inches, internal size 2.6*3.8 inches, the card protectors hard plastic is suitable for most cards extremely lightweight and can be carried in a pocket or bag.

【HIGH QUALITY】- Made with clear rigid PVC, the yugioh sleeves is waterproof and durable. Our packaging ensures that the plastic card holder will no bend curve and deform in transit. Acid-free sleeves offer your collectible cards a long-term protection.

【EXCELLENT SERVICE】- Your satisfaction is always our priority. If you have any concerns or question about our card sleeves hard plastic, whether before or after the purchase, please feel free to contact us, we will solve it in 12 hour
description: Product Description SERVE YOUR PRECIOUS ALL-ROUND PROTECTION Depending on the quantity you purchased, you will get: 100 hard sleeves + 100 clear sleeves.They serve your precious collectible trading cards an all-round protection. FOUR KEY FEATURE OF OUR CARD SLEEVE HARD PLASTIC As you can see, our hard sleeves are: Easy to use: Take out our card holders, tuck your sleeveless or sleeved card in, and that's all. Scratch resistant: Made of high-density materials, our card cases are scratch resistant, which will save you a lot of effort to tear off the film. High transparency: Unlike other blue and blurry sleeve, ours are highly transparent, which is good for showing the original charm of your cards. Sturdy and durable: Good quality and large quantity, our sleeves for trading cards are designed for long-term use by trading card collectors.
